zontes_bikes.description: The Zontes 350X is a semi-faired motorcycle powered by a 348cc liquid-cooled engine delivering 38.2 bhp. It offers excellent value in the mid-range segment with modern technology including a TFT display, keyless ignition, and TPMS.
features: 348cc BS6 Phase 2 liquid-cooled single-cylinder engine producing 38.2 bhp and 32.8 Nm torque
Dual-channel ABS with front and rear disc brakes

technical_specifications.features: TFT LCD display, Keyless ignition, 4 ride modes, LED lighting, Dual USB charging, TPMS

zontes_bikes.description: The Zontes 350R is a sporty street bike powered by a 348cc liquid-cooled engine combining responsive performance with modern features. It delivers both city riding capability and highway cruising comfort through its digital console with riding modes and keyless ignition.
features: 348cc BS6 Phase 2 liquid-cooled single-cylinder engine producing 38.2 bhp and 32.8 Nm torque
ABS braking system with front and rear disc brakes

technical_specifications.features: LED lights, Digital console, Riding modes, TPMS, Keyless ignition

zontes_bikes.description: The Zontes 350T is an adventure-touring motorcycle with a 348cc liquid-cooled engine and a generous 19-litre fuel tank for extended touring range. It features electronically adjustable windscreen, full-colour TFT display, and TPMS for a technology-rich riding experience.
features: 348cc BS6 Phase 2 liquid-cooled single-cylinder engine producing 38.2 bhp and 32.8 Nm torque
ABS braking system with front and rear disc brakes
Full-colour TFT display with tyre pressure monitoring

technical_specifications.features: TFT LCD display, Keyless ignition, 4 ride modes, LED lighting, Dual USB charging, TPMS

zontes_bikes.description: The Zontes GK350 is a neo-retro street bike with a 348cc liquid-cooled engine that competes directly in the 350cc segment. It features tubeless spoke wheels, a full LED setup, TFT display, and multiple ride modes for a comprehensive modern riding package.
features: 348cc BS6 Phase 2 liquid-cooled single-cylinder engine producing 38.2 bhp and 32.8 Nm torque
Dual disc brakes with ABS on both front and rear
Tubeless spoke wheels for neo-retro aesthetics
TFT display with multiple ride modes

technical_specifications.features: Full LED lights, TFT display, Keyless ignition, 4 ride modes, Dual USB charging, TPMS
